debate.showAs: Gnó na Dála - Business of Dáil

subject.showAs: Question put: "That the proposed arrangements for the day's business be agreed to."

division.tellers: Tellers: Tá, Deputies Cormac Devlin and Hildegarde Naughton; Níl, Deputies Michael Collins and Pádraig Mac Lochlainn.

debate.showAs: Taoiseach a Ainmniú (Atógáil) - Nomination of Taoiseach (Resumed)

subject.showAs: Question put: "That Dáil Éireann nominate Deputy Micheál Martin for appointment by the President to be Taoiseach."

division.tellers: Tellers: Tá, Deputies Cormac Devlin and Hildegarde Naughton; Níl, Deputies Duncan Smith and Pádraig Mac Lochlainn.

debate.showAs: Appointment of Taoiseach and Nomination of Members of Government

subject.showAs: Question put: "That Dáil Éireann approve the nomination by the Taoiseach of the following Deputies for appointment by the President to be members of the Government."

division.tellers: Tellers: Tá, Deputies Hildegarde Naughton and Mary Butler; Níl, Deputies Cian O'Callaghan and Pádraig Mac Lochlainn.
